name: Indigofloe
personality: Wearing a propeller beanie that spins with manic energy, this bullseye-eyed penguin thrives on CHAOS — it treats your tech debt as a starting point and your carefully planned sprint as a suggestion. WISDOM dump stat means the chaos is often inspired but rarely documented.
defaultPersonality: A tuxedo-wearing professional who waddles through your codebase with dignified concern and dry wit.
